pendingApplications.proposal: Enclose a parcel of land to the rear of the property and to change the use of the land to be included within the curtilage of the property. This current application relates solely to a smaller parcel of land measuring 3.0 m by 2.6 m, seeking to change its use so that it forms part of the residential curtilage. It is intended to be considered independently from the earlier submission. In addition, it is proposed to install a single rear gate within the existing boundary, measuring 1050 mm in width and 1800 mm in height, to provide convenient access for maintenance and servicing of the property, including landscaping, repairs, and utility works.
